2606.23670.title: Tapered Language Models
2606.23670.paper_summary: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-based variants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters are allocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original transformer and largely unchanged since, yet a growing body of evidence suggests that layers contribute non-uniformly to the final output, with later layers refining the residual stream rather than transforming it. We ask whether parameter capacity should reflect this asymmetry. Our controlled experiment shows that, under a fixed budget, allocating more capacity to earlier layers and less to later layers improves perplexity over a uniform-width baseline, while the reverse allocation hurts. Building on this result, we introduce Tapered Language Models (TLMs), an architectural principle in which a parameter-bearing component is monotonically tapered across depth under a fixed total budget. MLPs are the natural site for this instantiation: they dominate parameter count across all modern LM families and expose width as a single, clean axis of variation. Across three model scales and four architectures (Transformer, Gated Attention, Hope-attention, and Titans), tapering MLP width via a smooth cosine schedule consistently improves perplexity and downstream benchmark performance over uniform baselines, at no additional parameter or compute cost. These findings establish depth-aware capacity allocation as a simple, architecture-agnostic axis of language model design, a free lever hidden in plain sight.
2606.23670.paper_summary_zh: 現代語言模型，包括Transformer、遞歸和基於記憶的變體，共享一個共同的底盤：一堆相同的層，其中參數在深度上均勻分配。這是從原始Transformer繼承的默認設置，自那以來基本未變，但越來越多的證據表明，層對最終輸出的貢獻是不均勻的，後面的層會精煉殘差流而不是轉換它。我們詢問參數容量是否應該反映這種不對稱性。我們的控制實驗顯示，在固定預算下，將更多容量分配給早期層而將較少容量分配給後期層，能改善相較於均勻寬度基準的困惑度，而反向分配則會造成損害。基於這一結果，我們引入了逐漸減少的語言模型（Tapered Language Models, TLMs），這是一種架構原則，其中承載參數的組件在固定總預算下沿深度單調減少。多層感知器（MLPs）是這一實現的自然場所：它們在所有現代語言模型家族中主導參數數量，並將寬度顯示為一個單一的、清晰的變化軸。在三種模型規模和四種架構（Transformer、門控注意力、希望注意力和泰坦）中，通過平滑的餘弦計劃逐漸減少MLP寬度，能持續改善困惑度和下游基準性能，相較於均勻基準，且不增加任何額外的參數或計算成本。這些發現確立了深度感知的容量分配作為一個簡單的、與架構無關的語言模型設計軸，是一個隱藏在明面上的免費槓桿。
2606.23670.author: Reza Bayat et.al.
2606.23670.authors: Reza Bayat, Ali Behrouz, Aaron Courville
